name: Open Slides
description: Open-source, agent-friendly slide deck maker. Write presentations in Markdown, drop in your own logos and images, present fullscreen right in the app, and export to PDF. Powered by reveal.js.

deploy.title: Deploy your Open Slides
deploy.subtitle: Write decks in Markdown, present fullscreen in the browser, and export to PDF.

prompts.label: What kind of decks will you make?
prompts.placeholder: e.g. Sales pitches, all-hands updates, product demos
